title: Apple's Raising Prices. Here's What That Means for the Rest of Tech
abstract: Apple's Raising Prices. Here's What That Means for the Rest of Tech may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often out...
abstract_zh: 苹果又要涨价了？别急，我们这有个工具——Apple's Raising Prices. Here's What That Means for the Rest of Tech。它就像是技术界的气象预报员，精准地预测着苹果风向变化，让你提前做好心理准备。而且，这个小工具还特能挖苦同行，简直就是科技圈的段子手！不过别担心，它的核心功能就是帮你省钱——知道别人家的产品涨价了，咱们再慢慢挑便宜货。不信？用一次你就服了！
